messages.content: gonna run 5s or just shoot around

easy for u to say u run hot
christmas is in a week and i have nothing for u
lmao dont get me anything bro
nah come on what do u want

lol thats weirdly specific but ok
bro whatever. like 50 bucks would be sick
think we got some regulars now lol

u think theyll play la bamba
but im hoping for the deep cuts
mas y mas would be insane live
granada is such a good venue
fr best sightlines in dallas imo
ok ill scoop u at like 7ish?
subject was literally 'Quick check-in on workload'
yep she saw my timestamps on airtable
bro i literally told u this would happen 😂
i wrote back explaining everything. workflow cleanup, quiet helps me focus, offered to move to business hours
i feel ok about it i think
'thanks for flagging, ill adjust my schedule' thats literally all u needed
ok real talk for a sec
I know you think its fine because you're not touching patient records. But the audit tool doesn't care what table you were in. It sees a clinician on clinic systems at 1am and flags it.
your name popping up at 1am five different times in two months is a pattern francisco
but theres no PHI in the referral tracker
doesn't matter. report shows timestamp, system, user. thats it. and to someone who doesnt know airtable from epic it all looks the same
read that when u get a sec. nurse in houston accessed EHR from home at 2am just to check her schedule. investigation lasted 4 months
ok but thats different right? she was in the actual EHR
is it tho? you're a credentialed clinician accessing clinic tools in the middle of the night. someone who doesnt know what airtable is sees the exact same thing
im saying this as your friend and as someone who does this for a living. the work is genuinely great. the timestamps are the problem. do it at 7:30 before rounds or over lunch
and next time she asks about something like this, two sentences 😂 dont write a dissertation

honestly though it freaked me out a little. like i KNOW the work is clean and im not in any patient charts at 1am but seeing my name in an audit summary felt like getting called to the principals office. i havent slept right since the email landed

thats actually a healthy reaction. the people who SHOULD be worried are the ones who never feel that way. seriously tho - move the airtable work to mornings, log out of clinic email after 6, and if u find yourself opening it past 10 close the laptop. give renata 30 days of clean timestamps and she forgets the whole thing

yeah ur right. its honestly the only window i feel like i can think clearly without 50 things pinging me but i hear you. ill set a hard 9pm laptop-down rule starting tomorrow and move the workflow stuff to before standup
bro i saw you online at 2am last night 😂 please tell me that was gaming and not what i think it was
can sophie come over for a little bit
mom is dropping me off at 11
we got our science fair assignment today!!
i wanna build a SOLAR OVEN ☀️🔥
can u help me build it pls pls pls
obviously 🤓 let me look up some designs tonight
ordered the supplies for ur solar oven 📦☀️
reflective panels and a thermometer. should be here by friday
ok so we need insulation for the box. the sides were leaking heat
yeah i noticed it wasnt getting hot enough inside
ordering foam board and aluminum tape rn
WAIT R WE ACTUALLY GOING TO BRECKENRIDGE
wait i dont even have ski pants 😭
we'll figure it out dont worry 😊

like 20s prob lol its cold cold
YESSS sophia is literally so jealous
pls pls pls hot chocolate at the lodge

ms. ryan is gonna be so impressed

already printed it at office depot 😎
dad look i found this tiktok of breckenridge
i cant wait i cant wait

DAD i was looking at the breckenridge map and there is literally a tubing hill called peak 8 and another one called gold rush and they have NIGHT TUBING with like lights and music??? we HAVE to do night tubing pls pls pls. also can we do the mountain coaster?? maddie went last year and said its insane 🎿⭐🤩

ok mija the rei box came today. opening it is going to ruin the surprise so im hiding it til the trip but they sent the tubing pants in the wrong size and i had to swap. should land thursday. dont tell mom about the trip stuff yet, its still a surprise for the spring break thing 😉
daddd can we get tacos for dinner 🌮
hey sorry was lying down. yeah we can talk dinner later
u keep getting up at night i can hear u walking around 😭
lol sorry didnt mean to wake u up. im good
just ate something weird, im totally fine 😊
ok lol can we still do tacos tho 🌮🌮
idc im making a packing list rn
lol slow down. whats the emergency
i was looking at my packing list and i dont have snow pants
ok ok ill order some stuff tonight 👍
can u get them from REI they have rly cute ones

ill find u good ones dont worry 😎
already got tubing in the package 😏

she was like HOW UR SO LUCKY
hahaha tell her she can come next time 😂
ur ski stuff just got delivered 📦

just say its not all planned yet. ill handle it w her 👍
ur fine dont worry about it 😊
can i use ur phone for a sec

oh let me grab that real quick
sorry lol thats just boring pharmacy stuff 😅
can i still use it tho
here just use the laptop its on my desk

Spring soccer registration closes the 10th. Need to split the fee.
ok let me look at things and get back to u
I'll send you the details by email.

Elena left her ortho retainer at your place last weekend. She needs it. Dr. Reyes was clear about wearing it nightly and she'll start sliding back if she skips a week. Can you drop it off at the school office tomorrow morning so the front desk can give it to her at lunch.
yes. ill drop it at the office before 8. i found it in her overnight bag this morning and was about to text you. sorry about that, i should have checked the bag before i picked her up sunday.
Sunday 5pm at the school. Also Elena mentioned there's medicine on the bathroom counter at your place. Can you make sure it's put away before she comes over?

fine but if a tomato vine touches my chair were having WORDS. also if u get cilantro ill help u keep it alive that stuff dies if u look at it wrong. and we are 100% making salsa with the homegrown stuff in july
